arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Lazio: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Serie A clash against Lazio. After resting during Thursday’s Coppa Italia defeat, key figures Romelu Lukaku, Stanislav Lobotka, and Khvicha Kvaratskhelia are expected to reclaim their spots in the starting lineup. This return likely means Giovanni Simeone will step aside, despite his impressive track record against Lazio. The Argentine striker, who netted in the midweek cup match, boasts an outstanding eight goals in 14 Serie A appearances against the Roman club – the highest tally among current players.
